td.span: Concussion with no loss of consciousness

tr.td: 1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
Amlodipine (as amlodipine besylate) 2.5 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (2.5 mg) by mouth once daily
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Hepatitis B virus antigen only vaccine product

ul.li: Achieve systolic blood pressure less than 130 mmHg through lifestyle modifications.
Achieve diastolic blood pressure less than 80 mmHg through lifestyle modifications.
Achieve and maintain HbA1c below 7% through lifestyle modification and medication adherence.
Lose at least 5% of baseline body weight to improve glycemic control and metabolic health.
Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity aerobic activity per week.
Adopt a balanced diet with reduced intake of refined carbohydrates and saturated fats.
Self-monitor fasting blood glucose at least 3 times per week.

tr.td: Blood pressure panel with all children optional
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity aerobic activity per week.
Adopt a balanced diet with reduced intake of refined carbohydrates and saturated fats.
